text:
Reunion: Part 2 (②, Saikai (Ni)) is the 221 st chapter of the Hunter × Hunter manga, written and illustrated by Yoshihiro Togashi.

Synopsis

Cheetu is facing Morel and Knuckle on a deserted highway. He tells them that he knows they were waiting for him and that he will beat them at their own game, without giving them the chance to strike back. Knuckle smiles at him and replies saying that his punches are weak since they do not weight them, adding that he couldn't kill him and Morel even with 10,000 of them. Cheetu ignores Knuckle's insult and assumes that he is too proud to admit defeat. The Chimera Ant then starts running all around the Hunters, punching them while they are unable to hit him back. Cheetu laughs about them swinging after the strike and tells them that he isn't even putting effort into his speed and power yet. Knuckle then almost hits him accurately in the face, and this surprises Cheetu since Knuckle can't even follow him with his eyes. Morel then nearly hits him with his pipe and Cheetu, again surprised, realizes that even though they have only been fighting for a minute, both of them have already adjusted to his speed. The Ant, finding it fun that they can do this and thinking it's worth playing with his food, tells them that they can't react fast enough and, as inferior beings, wonders if they'll try to match his speed with guns or by recruiting more Hunters.

Knuckle smiles again and tells Cheetu that they will make up the difference with wits and experience. Morel then blows out more smoke, making Cheetu wonder if it could be poison or sleeping gas, but after seeing that they are breathing it too, he rejects these notions and wonders if this is Morel's ability. Morel taunts him by asking if he is scared and giving him the chance to run away. Cheetu laughs and asks if it means that he won't, then deducing that it's a smokescreen that they'll use as cover to attack. He tells them to show him what they got as Knuckle is about to punch him. Cheetu sees it from the corner of his eye and dodges, only to become surrounded on all sides by numerous Knuckles. Surprised by this, he doesn't notice one of them hitting him hard in his side and pushing him away. The smoke clones of Knuckle created by Morel then disappear, and Knuckle tells Cheetu that people freeze when they are startled and this wouldn't work a second time, but one time is enough for him.

Cheetu asks Knuckle why he thinks this, for he was caught by surprise but it didn't hurt him. Knuckle's A.P.R. then shows up floating beside Cheetu's shoulder, making him wonder what it is and why it calls out that he has accrued interest. Knuckle taunts him, and Cheetu continues to demand the answer, but Knuckle disappears into the smoke, and as Cheetu moves toward him, Morel sticks his leg out from the smoke and trips the Ant.

With a grin, Morel tells him that now that he's blinded by rage, making him stumble is easy. Cheetu completely loses his cool and screams at them in anger, but as the smoke disappears, so have Morel and Knuckle and all he can do is ask them where they went. A.P.R. then tells him it is time and that he has accrued interest while showing him the number 375. Angered, Cheetu decides to leave A.P.R. in his dust regardless of what it is, running away as quickly as he can.

Morel and Knuckle then come out of the bushes beside the road, and Morel remarks that Cheetu can't cope with Zetsu, which they used to hide their presence. Knuckle responds that Cheetu is a newbie, and Morel tells him to keep his guard up and not underestimate him. Knuckle explains that A.P.R. will give him Cheetu's general location and that they can chase him down, close in, and kill him. Surprised, Morel states that he thought A.P.R. loses its effect once it gets too far away. Knuckle explains that it stops accruing interest, but it won't disappear and will start counting down again when he gets close to his target, adding that he doesn't need it to make it change to I.R.S. Morel quickly rebukes him, saying that even if they know his pitches, it isn't a guarantee against striking out and that someone else will be better suited to fight him. Knuckle agrees with his master and wonders how Gon is doing.

Coming to a stop in a forest, Cheetu realizes that being fast isn't good enough to get rid of A.P.R. since it involves Nen, knowing that he has to use something besides speed. Meanwhile, in the Tri-Orb Hotel, Killua says that Gon got a rare prize, while Shoot is seen watching the two from behind a corner.

Characters in Order of Appearance

Trivia

The chapter has the same title as Chapter 201, and it was reused for Chapter 273 (which Viz translated differently).
